item.title: Ideas from Zero to One | Peter Thiel
item.description:
Who is Peter Thiel

Peter Thiel is an American entrepreneur, investor, and philanthropist. He is best known for his work in the field of artificial intelligence and his role as the co-founder of PayPal and LinkedIn. He is also a member of the Board of Directors of the United States Department of Defense and the United States Department of Energy.

What is Zero to One

Zero to One is a book by Peter Thiel that explores the concept of innovation and entrepreneurship. The book argues that innovation is not just about coming up with new ideas, but also about creating new markets and new ways of doing things.

item.title: About
item.description: Hugo, the world's fastest framework for building websites

item.title: Guide on how to make a personal website using Hugo
